markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the development of Atlas Sync project, focusing on pipeline management and execution features.](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The team is developing a pipeline management system similar to AirOps, with a focus on simplifying UI and improving performance](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Key features include pipeline execution table, step management, and input/output handling](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [The project scope is substantial, but there's optimism about releasing a usable version quickly by prioritizing core functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [The team is actively recruiting, with offers out to Dana and potentially Stephanie, to support various aspects of the project](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Management and Execution UI

  - [Developing a table-based UI for pipeline execution management](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=484.0)
      - [Collapsible completed workflows to reduce clutter](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Ability to run single cells, multiple selected cells, or entire rows](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Checkbox and play button for execution control](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
      - [Retry functionality for completed steps](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [Planning to use YAML for initial pipeline configuration, with potential for a more sophisticated editor later](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Input/Output Handling

  - [Discussing syntax for referencing outputs of previous steps (e.g., `$steps.step_id`)](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
  - [Considering UI components for different data types (text, dates, numbers, images)](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Initially focusing on text/markdown input, with plans to expand to more complex types later](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=890.0)

### Performance Considerations

  - [Addressing concerns about UI slowdown with large datasets](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Implementing pagination and archiving for older executions](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=1713.0)
  - [Potential for downloading completed executions to improve performance](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)

### Pipeline Versioning

  - [Recognizing the need to version pipelines to handle changes without breaking existing executions](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2284.0)
  - [Considering cloning views when pipeline structure changes](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2301.0)

### Team Expansion and Roles

  - [Offers being prepared for Dana and potentially Stephanie](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
  - [Planning to hire 3-4 people for client ops roles](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2839.0)
  - [Discussing potential roles for new hires:](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2809.0)
      - [Dana: Working on product-level features](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2739.0)
      - [Stephanie: Potentially working on SDK development](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2780.0)
      - [Clint: Focusing on scalability and infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)

### Current Development Progress

  - [Felipe is making good progress and enjoying the focused development time](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2596.0)
  - [The team is optimistic about delivering a usable version quickly by prioritizing core functionalities](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2443.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Continue development of core pipeline management and execution features](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2108.0)
  - [Finalize and extend offers to Dana and Stephanie](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2709.0)
  - [Proceed with hiring for client ops and additional engineering roles](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2839.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting on Thursday to discuss further ideas and progress](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2881.0)
  - [Prioritize simplifying UI elements to accelerate development and release timeline](https://fathom.video/share/knXE7sapHhpSkY3qWaHfMM1RxfRSbHT5?tab=summary&timestamp=2491.0)
